channel.title: Posts on NewPlayer
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on NewPlayer

item.title: 11. Container With Most Water
item.description: 問題 You are given an integer array height of length n. There are n vertical lines drawn such that the two endpoints of the ith line are (i, 0) and (i, height[i]). Find two lines that together with the x-axis form a container, such that the container contains the most water. Return the maximum amount of water a container can store. Notice that you may not slant the container.

item.title: 10. Regular Expression Matching
item.description: 問題 Given an input string s and a pattern p, implement regular expression matching with support for ’.’ and ’*’ where: ’.’ Matches any single character.​​​​ ’*’ Matches zero or more of the preceding element. The matching should cover the entire input string (not partial). 翻譯 給定輸入字符串 s 和

item.title: 9. Palindrome Number
item.description: 問題 Given an integer x, return true if x is a palindrome, and false otherwise. Follow up: Could you solve it without converting the integer to a string? 翻譯 給定一個整數 x，如果 x 是一個 回文數(即正序和倒序讀都相同) ，則返回 true，否

item.title: 8. String to Integer (atoi)
item.description: 問題 Implement the myAtoi(string s) function, which converts a string to a 32-bit signed integer (similar to C/C++’s atoi function). The algorithm for myAtoi(string s) is as follows: Read in and ignore any leading whitespace. Check if the next character (if not already at the end of the string) is ’-’ or ’+’. Read this character in if it is either. This determines if the final result is negative

item.title: 7. Reverse Integer
item.description: 問題 Given a signed 32-bit integer x, return x with its digits reversed. If reversing x causes the value to go outside the signed 32-bit integer range [-231 , 231 - 1], then return 0. Assume the environment does not allow you to store 64-bit integers (signed or unsigned). 翻譯 給定一個帶符號的 32 位整數 x，請將其數

item.title: 6. Zigzag Conversion
item.description: 問題 The string “PAYPALISHIRING” is written in a zigzag pattern on a given number of rows like this: (you may want to display this pattern in a fixed font for better legibility) P A H N A P L S I I G Y I R And then read line by line: “PAHNAPLSIIGYIR” Write the code that will take a string and make this conversion given a number of

item.title: 5. Longest Palindromic Substring
item.description: 問題 Given a string s, return the longest palindromic substring in s. 翻譯 給定一個字符串 s，請返回 s 中最長的回文字串。 Example 1: Input: s = "babad" Output: "bab" Explanation: "aba" is also a valid answer. Example 2: Input: s = "cbbd" Output: "bb" Constraints: 1 <= s.length <= 1000 s consist of only

item.title: 4. Median of Two Sorted Arrays
item.description: 問題 Given two sorted arrays nums1 and nums2 of size m and n respectively, return the median of the two sorted arrays. The overall run time complexity should be O(log (m+n)). 翻譯 給定兩個已排序的數組 nums1 和 nums2，它們的大小分別為 m 和 n。請返回這兩個

item.title: 3. Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
item.description: 問題 Given a string s, find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters. 翻譯 給定一個字符串s，找到最長的不含重複字符的子串的長度。 Example 1: Input: s = "abcabcbb" Output: 3 Explanation: The answer is "abc", with the length of 3. Example 2: Input: s = "bbbbb" Output:

item.title: 2. Add Two Numbers
item.description: 問題 You are given two non-empty linked lists representing two non-negative integers. The digits are stored in reverse order, and each of their nodes contains a single digit. Add the two numbers and return the sum as a linked list. You may assume the two numbers do not contain any leading zero, except the number 0 itself. 翻譯 您被給予兩個非空的鏈

item.title: 1. Two Sum
item.description: 問題 Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target. You may assume that each input would have exactly one solution, and you may not use the same element twice. You can return the answer in any order. 翻譯 給定一個整數數組，返回兩個數字

item.title: Hugo 建置到 GitHub Page
item.description: 這裡會介紹建置好的 Hugo 網站，Push 到 GitHub Page 上 產生靜態檔案 先移到 Hugo 的資料夾(hugo new site myweb 產生的資料夾)， cd myweb 執行 hugo 就會看到 Hugo 資料夾裡面的 public 資料

item.title: Hugo 建置
item.description: 雖然架 GitHub 網站時，我有發現有 Jekyll ,Hexo, Hugo，不過 Jekyll 裝完發現太舊，Hexo, Hugo 選了好久，發現用 Hugo 的人比較多，而且 Hugo 如果文章多，建置似乎比較快，就選

item.title: Git Extensions Push GitHub
item.description: 還沒安裝 Git Extensions 的可以參考這個 註冊 要在 GitHub 上 Push 當然也需要帳號拉~ 先到 GitHub 網站註冊， 還沒註冊的可以參考這個 GitHub 新增專案 再來就是點頭像，到專案去，按綠色的

item.title: Git Extensions 安裝和 Commit
item.description: 為什麼要用 Git Extensions 呢，很簡單，因為 Git 指令我常常忘記XDDDD 而且他的 UI 很棒(?)外貌協會(X) 下載 要使用 Git Extensions 前，要先裝 Git，看使用的 OS 裝對應的

item.title: 使用 GitHub 製作個人網站
item.description: GitHub 上只能架設靜態網站，如果想要架設動態的可能要去找其他的地方，但如果只是要架靜態網站是個不錯的選擇。 建立帳號 要在 GitHub 上架網站當然需要一個帳號拉

item.title: GitHub 帳號註冊
item.description: 建立帳號 要在 GitHub 帳號~ 當然先到 GitHub 網站， 右上方辦理，如下圖: 按進去後就會看到，很炫的註冊網站， 值得注意的是中間的 username 那邊會是之後 git 上去資料夾的根目
